privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Webots world (prosthetic_hand_test.wbt). The target modifications are explicitly defined in the task instructions and strictly validated via verifier scripts: WorldInfo timestep must be reduced to 16, TEST_EGG physics mass to 0.05, and both INDEX_TIP and THUMB_TIP nodes must be converted to TouchSensors with type 'force-3d' and resolution 0.001. All node DEF names and properties accurately reflect the setup_task.sh template.
